name: Cohn Robbins Holdings Corp.
summary: Cohn Robbins Holdings Corp. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. The company was formerly known as CSR Acquisition Corp. Cohn Robbins Holdings Corp. was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Wilmington, Delaware.
